summary: Completed comprehensive testing of admin system for 'Propiedades Turísticas RD' real estate website. All backend authentication and statistics APIs working perfectly (100% success rate). Frontend admin panel fully functional with all required tabs and features. Login system, dashboard statistics, brand customization, style editor, and property management with status badges all working correctly.

design_issues.issue: JWT tokens appear to expire quickly during testing sessions, causing redirects to login page

passed_tests: Backend /api/auth/setup creates admin user (200 OK)
Backend /api/auth/login with admin/admin123 returns JWT token (200 OK)
Backend /api/auth/me returns current user info with valid token (200 OK)
Backend /api/stats returns statistics data with daily visits, weekly visits, properties count (200 OK)
Backend /api/track/visit successfully tracks page visits (200 OK)
All backend CRUD operations working (28/28 tests passed - 100% success rate)
Login page at /admin shows username/password form with proper data-testids
Login with admin/admin123 credentials redirects to /admin/dashboard successfully
Dashboard shows statistics tab with daily visits (15), weekly visits (15), properties count (7), messages count (7)
Dashboard has all required tabs: Estadísticas, Marca y Logo, Estilo, Ubicaciones, Propiedades, Mensajes
Estadísticas tab displays statistics cards, top 3 properties section, and visits by day chart
Marca y Logo tab has logo upload button, agency name input field, hero images upload section
Agency name input populated with 'Propiedades Turísticas RD'
Estilo tab has color pickers (primary/secondary), font selectors (heading/body), size options, layout alignment
Style editor includes preview section showing font and color changes
Ubicaciones tab shows location list with edit/delete buttons and add location functionality
Properties tab shows property list with status badges (Disponible/Vendido)
Property form includes video URLs field for YouTube videos
Property form has status selector with Disponible/Vendido/Reservado options
Messages tab displays contact messages with proper formatting
Public homepage loads without requiring login authentication
Homepage shows hero section, property cards, navigation, footer, and WhatsApp button

success_percentage.backend: 100% (28/28 authentication, statistics, and CRUD API endpoints working)
success_percentage.frontend: 95% (All major admin panel functionality working, minor session management note)
